    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.ExcludeFromCodeCoverageAttribute]
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly : global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenTypeShapeProvider
    {
        private const global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags __BindingFlags_Instance_All = 
            global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | 
            global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | 
            global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance;
        
        private const global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags __BindingFlags_All = 
            __BindingFlags_Instance_All | global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Static;
        
        /// <summary>Gets the default instance of the <see cref="TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly"/> class.</summary>
        public static TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly Default { get; } = new();
        
        /// <summary>Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly"/> class.</summary>
        private TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly() { }
        
        /// <summary>Initializes the field ensuring the same instance is always returned.</summary>
        private T __Init_Singleton<T>(ref T? field, T value) where T : class =>
            global::System.Threading.Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref field, value, null) ?? value;
        
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public override global::PolyType.ITypeShape? GetTypeShape(global::System.Type type)
        {
            // This method looks up type shapes from the entire transitive type graph
            // being generated, as such in certain cases it can grow very large.
            // In order to avoid performance issues associated loading all application
            // types at once, perform a string-based lookup first before calling into
            // a separate method returning the matching shape. The helper method guards
            // the returned shape with a check against the literal type expression to aid
            // trimmability of shapes of unused types.
            switch (type?.ToString())
            {
                case "PolyType.Abstractions.Unit":
                {
                    return GetMatchingTypeShape(type);
                
                    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
                    ITypeShape? GetMatchingTypeShape(System.Type type) =>
                        type == typeof(global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit) ? Unit : null;
                }
                case "System.Boolean":
                {
                    return GetMatchingTypeShape(type);
                
                    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
                    ITypeShape? GetMatchingTypeShape(System.Type type) =>
                        type == typeof(bool) ? Boolean : null;
                }
                case "System.Int32":
                {
                    return GetMatchingTypeShape(type);
                
                    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
                    ITypeShape? GetMatchingTypeShape(System.Type type) =>
                        type == typeof(int) ? Int32 : null;
                }
                case "System.String":
                {
                    return GetMatchingTypeShape(type);
                
                    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
                    ITypeShape? GetMatchingTypeShape(System.Type type) =>
                        type == typeof(string) ? String : null;
                }
                case "TestNamespace.RefParamDemo":
                {
                    return GetMatchingTypeShape(type);
                
                    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
                    ITypeShape? GetMatchingTypeShape(System.Type type) =>
                        type == typeof(global::TestNamespace.RefParamDemo) ? RefParamDemo : null;
                }
                default:
                    return null;
            }
        }
    }
